name: Discern Security
description: AI-native agentic proactive security platform with 6 specialized autonomous agents (Scout, Atlas, Oracle, Pathfinder, Resolve, Mesh) for security workflows. Agents assess security posture, analyze data, prioritize remediation, and operationalize findings across fragmented security tools.
notes: Launched March 19, 2026. Founded 2023, raised $3M funding. Showcasing at RSA Conference 2026. Six specialized agents: Scout (intelligence foundation), Atlas (query/dashboards), Oracle (analysis/insights), Pathfinder (prioritization), Resolve (remediation operations), Mesh (security mesh coordination).
